requirement_topic.en: Wireless-equipped cordless tools and SDPPI radio approval
requirement_topic.zh: 带无线功能无绳工具与SDPPI无线审批
requirement_topic.zht: 帶無線功能無繩工具與 SDPPI 無線核准

summary.en: For cordless tools that include radio transmission or radio-enabled modules, Indonesia requires compliance through SDPPI radio-type approval pathways in addition to electrical safety documentation. EMC behavior and RF exposure or interference controls are reviewed under the communications authority route rather than being fully closed by electrical test files alone.
summary.zh: 对于含有无线发射或无线模块的无绳工具，印尼要求除电气安全资料外，还按 SDPPI 的无线型式认证路径处理。电磁兼容与射频干扰/暴露控制仍由通信监管路径评估，不会完全由单独的电气测试文件直接关闭。
summary.zht: 對於含有無線傳輸或無線模組的無繩工具，印尼要求除電氣安全資料外，還按 SDPPI 的無線型式認可路徑處理。電磁相容與射頻干擾／暴露控制仍由通訊監管路徑評估，不會完全由單獨的電氣測試文件直接關閉。

standards_or_laws: SDPPI type-approval framework for telecommunications and radio modules in electrical products
Indonesian radio and EMC technical requirements for imported wireless-enabled devices
Market-entry filing rules where product scope includes cordless or communication-capable functions

summary.en: China documents commonly use GB/T EMC series and MIIT-linked telecom filing routes for product families, and these are useful for engineering comparison only. They are separate domestic compliance instruments and do not replace the Indonesia SDPPI radio route.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常使用 GB/T EMC 系列和 MIIT 相关的通信审批路径作为技术文件基础，只能用于工程对照，属于国内合规工具，不能替代印尼 SDPPI 的无线审查路径。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常使用 GB/T EMC 系列和 MIIT 相關的通訊審批路徑作為技術文件基礎，只能用於工程對照，屬於國內合規工具，不能替代印尼 SDPPI 的無線審查路徑。

standards_or_laws: MIIT telecommunication device filing rules in China
Domestic China telecom evidence and CCC-linked pathways

gap.en: The common gap is a compliance branch split. Teams often treat electrical safety and EMC together, but the Indonesian channel frequently adds a separate SDPPI approval for cordless radio functions, and test reports are not treated as interchangeable.
gap.zh: 常见差距在于合规分支未分开处理。团队常将电气安全与EMC一并处理，但印度尼西亚渠道通常对无绳无线功能另行要求 SDPPI 审批，中国报告不被视为可互认。
gap.zht: 常見差距在於合規分支未分開處理。團隊常將電氣安全與 EMC 一併處理，但印尼通道通常對無繩無線功能另行要求 SDPPI 核准，中國報告不被視為互認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where cordless or radio-enabled power tools fall under Indonesian telecom or wireless approval scope. Market readiness depends on SDPPI route completion for those functions.
mandatory_status.cn: China EMC and telecom evidence is often mandatory domestically, but it does not by itself complete the Indonesian SDPPI approval requirement.

source.publisher: Satuan Kerja Pengkajian dan Penelitian Industri / SDPPI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat cordless radio compliance as a distinct Indonesian branch. Without SDPPI approval and channel-appropriate EMC/RF documentation, Chinese GB/MIIT papers are technical references only, not market-entry evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将无绳无线合规视为印度尼西亚独立分支。不具 SDPPI 审核和对应 EMC/RF 文件前，中国 GB/MIIT 资料仅能作为技术参考，而非市场准入证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將無繩無線合規視為印尼獨立分支。不具 SDPPI 核准與對應 EMC/RF 文件前，中國 GB/MIIT 資料僅能作為工程參考，而非市場准入證據。
